scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run cleanup && pnpm -r --filter @workspace/api-server --filter @workspace/lista --parallel run dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.pilot-smoke: pnpm exec playwright test enrollment lista-qa-matrix --reporter=list && node artifacts/lista/scripts/pilot-insforge-data.mjs
scripts.pilot-smoke:full: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build --filter @workspace/lista && pnpm run pilot-smoke
